params.count: Number of most recent snapshots to return

params.fees: New fees since last report (G$ units)
params.ubi: New UBI portion since last report

dailySnapshots(uint256).notice: Daily snapshots for charting (day index → snapshot)

getAllProtocols().notice: Get all protocols in a single call (for frontend).

getDashboardData().notice: Aggregate dashboard data in a single call.

getProtocol(uint256).notice: Get full stats for a protocol.

protocolBySource(address).notice: Reverse lookup: feeSource address → protocol ID

registerProtocol(string,string,address).notice: Register a new protocol for tracking.

reportFees(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint2.notice: Report fee activity for a protocol. Called by keepers/bots.

takeSnapshot().notice: Take a daily snapshot for historical charting.

documentation.text:
@title UBI Revenue Tracker
 @notice Aggregate per-protocol fee accounting for the UBI Impact Dashboard.
         Each registered protocol reports its cumulative UBI contributions.
         Purely read-layer — does NOT move funds (UBIFeeSplitter handles that).
         Frontend queries this to render per-protocol breakdown: how much each
         dApp (swaps, perps, predict, lend, stable, stocks, bridge) has sent
         to the UBI pool.
@notice Reverse lookup: feeSource address → protocol ID
@notice Daily snapshots for charting (day index → snapshot)
@notice Take a daily snapshot for historical charting.
@notice Get full stats for a protocol.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) pure returns (struct UBIRevenueTracker.ProtocolStats memory[] memory)

documentation.text: @notice Get all protocols in a single call (for frontend).

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) pure returns (struct UBIRevenueTracker.Snapshot memory[] memory)

 @param count Number of most recent snapshots to return
